x.name: Cognition (Devin)
x.bio: Makers of Devin, the first AI software engineer. We are an applied AI lab building end-to-end software agents. Join us: https://t.co/JZDd4VhMfh

tweets.text:
Auto-Triage connects Devin to the systems where issues already show up: Slack, Linear, GitHub, schedules, webhooks, observability tools, tickets, alerts, and code.

When something needs attention, Devin starts to investigate automatically.

Introducing Devin Auto-Triage: Your AI first-responder with long-term memory.

Devin can monitor incoming bugs, alerts, and incidents, investigate them, and come back with context, next steps, or a PR.

this pairs well with the claude-api skill (bundled with Claude Code). 

ask Claude Code to investigate the cache misses using the diagnostics to guide.
